calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-19-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-19-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

John P. Zanghi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Denis Lappos, who was not present at today's hearing.
Melinda Green, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Robert Ulmer.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on May 6, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Contract for the Rental of
Residential Property dated 08/05/05--------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Three Day Notice to Pay Rent of Quit dated 02/18/08----------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Proof of Service of Three Day Notice
to Pay Rent or Quit dated 02/18/08---------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Denis Lappos, and against defendant ROBERT ULMER as follows:

Plaintiff Denis Lappos shall recover from defendant ROBERT ULMER Rent/Per Diem Damages in the sum of $4,0108.00, and Costs in the amount of $280.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $4,290.80.

Plaintiff Denis Lappos is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 485 Union Street, #B, San Francisco, CA 94133. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WED, MAY-14-2008:
